Deep release gate after scoped approval.

decisions.React Doctor: active-if-detected when project-owned; owner-approved-install when absent; GitHub Action, PR write permissions, and agent skill install require owner approval
decisions.Knip: use-if-existing cleanup candidate only; removed from active/default profiles
decisions.Oxlint: active-if-detected when project-owned; owner-approved-install when absent; supplements ESLint for large JS/TS/React repos
decisions.Playwright: active-if-detected when project-owned; ci-advisory first; ci-blocking-after-calibration only after stable evidence and owner approval
decisions.Gitleaks: active-if-detected or owner-approved-install baseline secret scanning
decisions.OSV Scanner: active-if-detected or owner-approved-install dependency vulnerability baseline
decisions.Semgrep: active-if-detected when present; owner-approved-install when absent; ci-advisory until rules are scoped
decisions.dependency-cruiser / Madge / jscpd: active-if-detected or owner-approved-install architecture and duplication checks
decisions.actionlint / zizmor: active-if-detected or owner-approved-install GitHub Actions hardening
decisions.code-review-graph: active-read-only source intelligence; install, indexing, MCP/global config, CI wiring, package changes, and product repo scanning require approval
decisions.open-design: active-reference design intelligence only; install/import/MCP/global config require approval
decisions.eslint-plugin-boundaries: active-install-if-project-type only after architecture layers are stable and owner-approved
decisions.Impeccable project-local install mode: approval-required; normalized Impeccable guidance remains active-reference
